title: Iran's Supreme Leader Threatens US Over Strait of Hormuz Blockade
summary: Iran's supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei threatened the US with elimination of enemies in the Gulf amid Trump's consideration of re-escalating the Iran war.[1]
contents:
## Iran's Supreme Leader Threatens US Over Strait of Hormuz Blockade

### Overview
Iran's supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei threatened the US with elimination of enemies in the Gulf amid Trump's consideration of re-escalating the Iran war.[1]

### Details
Khamenei warned that foreigners committing evil face submersion in water depths and vowed Tehran secures the Gulf while ending enemy abuses of the Strait of Hormuz. US military leaders brief Trump today on strike options, including infrastructure attacks and securing the strait to force Iran to negotiate. A Revolutionary Guards commander promised long painful strikes on US positions if America attacks.[1][2]

### Geographic context
Location: Tehran, Iran.
